posts.author: TeunMaas (Teun Maas)
posts.cookedHtml:
• Allowing guests to add an item description to a new item.

Stakeholders who access sprint boards as guest users face a limitation where they are unable to add an item description to new items or tickets. The process currently requires a regular user to first add the item description, after which a guest can only then edit it. This process is inefficient and diminishes the usefulness of item descriptions.
